creator: Alexander88207@protonmail.com
text:
Changes:

- Its now possible to create desktop shortcuts & to delete & reset everything.
- The check if Left 4 Gore is installed have been fixed.
- "Use a workaround" menu have been removed for now.
- The "run steam with software rendering" have been replaced by "use software rendering" in the new others menu.

Package changes:

- x11-fonts/noto have been removed and is now optional as run dep because it breaks installation of uplay but is requiered to install Teamspeak.
